post.description: OAuth2 compatible token login. Returns an access token for authenticated requests.

get.description: Get the currently authenticated user's profile.
Get all achievement packs in the current user's collection.

post.description: Add an achievement pack to the user's collection using its shareable code.

delete.description: Remove an achievement pack from the user's collection. This does not delete the pack itself.

get.description: Get the current user's progress for a specific achievement.

404.description: Achievement not found or no progress recorded

patch.description: Update the progress for a specific step in an achievement, identified by the step's stable ID.
Directly set completion status for an achievement (for stepless achievements).

get.description: Get the current user's progress for all achievements in their collection.

post.description:
Upload an image and return its URL.
The image will be saved to static/images/{subdir}/ directory.

put.description: Update an existing achievement. Only the creator can update.

403.description: Not authorized to update this achievement

delete.description: Delete an achievement. Only the creator can delete.

403.description: Not authorized to delete this achievement

get.description: Get a list of public/featured achievement packs.

put.description: Update an existing pack. Only the creator can update.

403.description: Not authorized to update this pack

delete.description: Delete a pack. Only the creator can delete.

403.description: Not authorized to delete this pack

overall_progress.title: Overall Progress
overall_progress.description: Progress as a decimal from 0.0 to 1.0

url.title: Url
url.description: The public URL of the uploaded image

id.title: Id
id.description: Optional stable step ID. Server generates one if not provided.
